title: Azienda Agricola Leona: an example of technological innovation for the production of biomethane from cereal straw
description: This practice abstract presents an example of innovative pre-treatment and upgrading technologies for converting cereal straw into biomethane at the Leona farm facility. It highlights the use of steam explosion, thermophilic anaerobic digestion, and circular bioeconomy principles through energy integration and digestate reuse.
